feat.name: Flexible Tail
feat.text: You can perform simple Interact actions with your tail, such as opening an unlocked door. Your tail can't perform actions that require fingers or significant manual dexterity, including any action that would require a check to accomplish, and you can't use it to hold items.

traits.name: Lizardfolk
traits.text: A creature with this trait is a member of the lizardfolk ancestry, a family of reptilian humanoids. An ability with this trait can be used or selected only by lizardfolk.
